debug_info.goal:
x y z : ℝ
h₀ : 0 ≤ x ∧ 0 ≤ y ∧ 0 ≤ z
h₁ : x + y + z = 1
⊢ 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ∧ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ 7 / 27

proof:
have h_aux : ∀ (a b c : ℝ), 0 ≤ a → 0 ≤ b → 0 ≤ c → a + b + c = 1 → a ≤ b → a ≤ c →
      0 ≤ b * c + c * a + a * b - 2 * a * b * c ∧ b * c + c * a + a * b - 2 * a * b * c ≤ 7 / 27 := by
    intro a b c ha hb hc habc hab hac
    have ha_le : a ≤ 1 / 3 := by linarith
    have hf : b * c + c * a + a * b - 2 * a * b * c = b * c * (1 - 2 * a) + a * (1 - a) := by nlinarith [habc]
    constructor
    · rw [hf]
      apply add_nonneg
      · apply mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg hb hc); linarith
      · apply mul_nonneg ha; linarith
    · rw [hf]
      have hbc : b * c ≤ (1 - a)^2 / 4 := by
        have h_sq : 4 * b * c ≤ (b + c)^2 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg (b - c)]
        have h_sum : b + c = 1 - a := by linarith
        nlinarith
      have h_bound : b * c * (1 - 2 * a) + a * (1 - a) ≤ (1 - a)^2 / 4 * (1 - 2 * a) + a * (1 - a) := by
        have : 0 ≤ 1 - 2 * a := by linarith
        nlinarith [hbc, this]
      refine h_bound.trans ?_
      have h_ring : (1 - a)^2 / 4 * (1 - 2 * a) + a * (1 - a) = 7 / 27 - (3 * a - 1)^2 * (6 * a + 1) / 108 := by ring
      rw [h_ring]
      have : 0 ≤ (3 * a - 1)^2 * (6 * a + 1) / 108 := by
        have : 0 ≤ (3 * a - 1)^2 := sq_nonneg (3 * a - 1)
        have : 0 ≤ 6 * a + 1 := by linarith
        nlinarith
      linarith
  have h_min : (x ≤ y ∧ x ≤ z) ∨ (y ≤ x ∧ y ≤ z) ∨ (z ≤ x ∧ z ≤ y) := by
    rcases le_total x y with hxy | hyx
    · rcases le_total x z with hxz | hzx
      · left; exact ⟨hxy, hxz⟩
      · right; right; exact ⟨hzx, by linarith⟩
    · rcases le_total y z with hyz | hzy
      · right; left; exact ⟨hyx, hyz⟩
      · right; right; exact ⟨by linarith, hzy⟩
  rcases h_min with h | h | h
  · exact h_aux x y z h₀.1 h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2 (by linarith [h₁]) h.1 h.2
  · rw [show y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z = x * z + z * y + y * x - 2 * y * x * z by ring]
    exact h_aux y x z h₀.2.1 h₀.1 h₀.2.2 (by linarith [h₁]) h.1 h.2
  · rw [show y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z = x * y + y * z + z * x - 2 * z * x * y by ring]
    exact h_aux z x y h₀.2.2 h₀.1 h₀.2.1 (by linarith [h₁]) h.1 h.2
successful_attempts:
have h_aux : ∀ (a b c : ℝ), 0 ≤ a → 0 ≤ b → 0 ≤ c → a + b + c = 1 → a ≤ b → a ≤ c →
      0 ≤ b * c + c * a + a * b - 2 * a * b * c ∧ b * c + c * a + a * b - 2 * a * b * c ≤ 7 / 27 := by
    intro a b c ha hb hc habc hab hac
    have ha_le : a ≤ 1 / 3 := by linarith
    have hf : b * c + c * a + a * b - 2 * a * b * c = b * c * (1 - 2 * a) + a * (1 - a) := by nlinarith [habc]
    constructor
    · rw [hf]
      apply add_nonneg
      · apply mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg hb hc); linarith
      · apply mul_nonneg ha; linarith
    · rw [hf]
      have hbc : b * c ≤ (1 - a)^2 / 4 := by
        have h_sq : 4 * b * c ≤ (b + c)^2 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg (b - c)]
        have h_sum : b + c = 1 - a := by linarith
        nlinarith
      have h_bound : b * c * (1 - 2 * a) + a * (1 - a) ≤ (1 - a)^2 / 4 * (1 - 2 * a) + a * (1 - a) := by
        have : 0 ≤ 1 - 2 * a := by linarith
        nlinarith [hbc, this]
      refine h_bound.trans ?_
      have h_ring : (1 - a)^2 / 4 * (1 - 2 * a) + a * (1 - a) = 7 / 27 - (3 * a - 1)^2 * (6 * a + 1) / 108 := by ring
      rw [h_ring]
      have : 0 ≤ (3 * a - 1)^2 * (6 * a + 1) / 108 := by
        have : 0 ≤ (3 * a - 1)^2 := sq_nonneg (3 * a - 1)
        have : 0 ≤ 6 * a + 1 := by linarith
        nlinarith
      linarith
  have h_min : (x ≤ y ∧ x ≤ z) ∨ (y ≤ x ∧ y ≤ z) ∨ (z ≤ x ∧ z ≤ y) := by
    rcases le_total x y with hxy | hyx
    · rcases le_total x z with hxz | hzx
      · left; exact ⟨hxy, hxz⟩
      · right; right; exact ⟨hzx, by linarith⟩
    · rcases le_total y z with hyz | hzy
      · right; left; exact ⟨hyx, hyz⟩
      · right; right; exact ⟨by linarith, hzy⟩
  rcases h_min with h | h | h
  · exact h_aux x y z h₀.1 h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2 (by linarith [h₁]) h.1 h.2
  · rw [show y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z = x * z + z * y + y * x - 2 * y * x * z by ring]
    exact h_aux y x z h₀.2.1 h₀.1 h₀.2.2 (by linarith [h₁]) h.1 h.2
  · rw [show y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z = x * y + y * z + z * x - 2 * z * x * y by ring]
    exact h_aux z x y h₀.2.2 h₀.1 h₀.2.1 (by linarith [h₁]) h.1 h.2
